title: Media Bucket Segment Store
description: Gives information on storage for particular flow segments. This schema is for the `http_object_store` media store type which provides URLs for storing media objects in bucket, and is the only store type currently implemented.

pre.description: Actions that need to be taken before the segments can be written to

bucket_id.description: The name of the bucket that needs to be created

segments.description: Mapping of timeranges (validated by regex) to segment storage locations. Format as described by the [TimeRange](../schemas/timerange#top) type

object_id.description: The object store identifier for the media object covering this timerange.
